figures.caption: Fig. 2: Qualitative analysis of the proposed framework SAiW on IndicSideFace [33]. Softcopy exhibits better display.

Fig. 3: Robustness evaluation of SAiW under diverse real-world distortions. Top: The embedded “Aol.” logo is perfectly recovered from an IndicSideFace [33] sample after multiple distortions. Bottom: The “©” watermark is recovered from CelebA [36] sample after distortions.
